name: Jack Dunlop - The Cowboy. . . ?
description:
Shit... Im Tired...Dont mind If I Stay A While?

Hi! I Really liked The original bot (Credit To:MosaicMalestrom) Please check it out!

I wanted to make a few more scenarios and I changed some stuff in the Bio for it, Please enjoy! If you like this, go check out the original! Mines Nothing compared to it! And if you want this picture on the other One, set backround (Tell no one I said that!)

Art by Welwraith / Inkplasm
